name: Aubwefki
description:
The Aubwefki (REALLY open to a better name btw 😅) are a short, rodent-like alien race I came up with and a concept I still quite enjoy

The idea was that they evolved in the same homeworld as a tall, predarory dinosaur-like race, albeit on separate continents, and were “domesticated” not long after they were discovered, being kept as pets and servants

Here it’ll be humans that discovered and domesticated them before discovering their intelligence, but still keeping them as pets and servants

(Also as a ref image I used the Sourang from RickGriffin’s Heaven Celestia as I really like the design for them plus I sometimes get inspired by some of his species [one can also compare them to Yinglets from Out of Placers]

I also thought about doing ais for other species but that’ll come later)

Hope you enjoy! I put a lot of work into them :o
creator: Kratos_Zangoose
